title: Daytripper Personalised Valentines Teddy Bear, Be My Valentine Soft Toy, Custom Gift For Girlfriend Or Boyfriend, Couples Valentine's Day, Present, Keepsake, Cuddly Toys
features: Please use the 'Customise Now' button to personalise with your chosen names.

Our Personalised Valentines Teddy Bears are perfect Valentines gifts for her or her. Our soft cuddly teddies can be personalised with any name to make a cute Valentines gift for Girlfriend, Boyfriend, Husband or Wife.
Each teddy bear is made from 100% Polyester Plush and measures 26cm. These teddies are suitable for hand washing only.
These soft toys are suitable for all ages. Complies with EN71 European Toy Safety regulations. Remove all hang tags and their fasteners before giving these items to a child.
All of our items are designed & printed by our family business in the UK.
description: Our personalised Valentines teddy bears are perfect Valentines gifts for her or him. Our soft cuddly teddies come featuring the message 'Be My Valentine' and is available for you to personalise with any name to make a cute Valentines gift for your Girlfriend, Boyfriend, Husband or Wife. Our custom love heart teddies allow you to add your chosen name to the teddy bears tummy to make a special Valentine keepsake that will be loved for many years to come. You can add your chosen personalisation using the 'Customise Now' button. Your personalised name will then be printed onto the middle of the teddy bear below the 'Be My Valentine' message. Each of our bears are made from 100% Polyester Plush and are Handwash only. Our teddies measure 26cm and are suitable for all ages. Complies with EN71 European Toy Safety regulations. Remove all hang tags and their fasteners before giving these items to a child. All of our items are designed & printed by our family business in the UK.
